Managing Director's Message

It gives me immense pleasure to welcome you at Takshila Institute.

With 27+ years of excellence, Takshila Institute is a trusted name in NEET and JEE coaching, empowering students nationwide through expert faculty, proven results, and state government partnerships.

N.K. Gupta

Managing Director

Quick Links

Admissions Open! For IIT-JEE & NEET Coaching in Delhi

Welcome to Takshila Institute

At Takshila, we are committed to providing top tier coaching for students aspiring to crack IIT JEE and NEET. With over two decades of success, we blend expert guidance, cutting-edge resources, and personalized attention to help you reach your full potential.

Our Centers
All Courses
Seminar Registration
Blogs

Our Coaching Programs

IIT JEE Coaching

At Takshila Institute, we provide a structured and rigorous coaching program for IIT JEE aspirants. Our comprehensive curriculum, regular mock tests, and personalized mentoring ensure that you are fully prepared for every aspect of the IIT JEE exam.

Discover Now
NEET Coaching

Our NEET coaching program is designed to build a strong foundation in all medical subjects, with a focus on both theoretical knowledge and practical application. Regular assessments and doubt-clearing sessions help you stay on track for success in the NEET exam.

Discover Now
Foundational Coaching

At Takshila Institute, we provide a structured and rigorous coaching program for IIT JEE and medical aspirant from 8th grade onwards, to strengthen their foundation and enable them to prepare from early years

Discover Now

Explore our most sought-after courses, trusted by top-performing students for effective exam preparation and success.

Why Takshila?

Proven Track Record
Subject-Specialized Faculty
Weekly Tests & Assessments
Regular Counseling & Motivation
Takshila Digital Classes & Library Access
Doubt Clearing Sessions
Monthly Parent-Teacher Meetings
Pan-India Network

We maintain small batch sizes of 25 to 30 students to ensure personalized attention and effective learning.

NCERT books form the foundation for comprehensive preparation for various competitive entrance exams.

Takshila Institute Empanelled as Partner coaching Institution with State Govt.

Online Study
Mobile App
Expert Faculties
Video Classes & Videos
Services

What We Offer at Takshila Institute

With over 27 years of experience, Takshila Institute has earned its place as a trusted leader in NEET and JEE preparation. Our student-centric approach, combined with advanced teaching techniques and expert faculty, ensures that each student receives the best possible guidance to succeed.

Learn more
Expert Faculty

Dedicated educators offering personalized mentorship to guide students.

Innovative Learning Tools

Utilizing advanced technology to enhance the learning experience.

Comprehensive Coaching Program

Tailored NEET and JEE programs to help students excel.

Nationwide Reach

25 centers across 10 states, making education accessible nationwide.

Testimonials

What Our Students Say

Aakash

Student, JEE-MAIN: 98.95%

I joined this institute with the hope of strengthening my concepts for JEE. The regular tests and well-designed assignments pushed me to improve every single week. The teachers guided us patiently and always encouraged us to think deeper. Their support truly boosted my confidence. I owe my performance to the faculty here.

Priya

Student, JEE-MAIN: 99.12%

Joining this institute was one of the best decisions for my exam preparation. The structured study plan helped me stay focused throughout the year. Our teachers were always available to clear doubts and refine our approach. The assessments played a huge role in identifying my weak areas. I’m grateful to the institute for shaping my success.

Karan

Student, JEE-MAIN: 97.88%

I enrolled here with the aim of improving my JEE performance, and the experience was truly transformative. The detailed notes and rigorous test series made learning easier and more effective. Teachers motivated us constantly and made difficult topics simple to understand. Every assignment was designed to challenge our thinking.

Meera

Student, JEE-MAIN: 99.34%

This institute offered me the guidance and discipline I needed for JEE. The practice tests were extremely helpful in building accuracy and speed. Our teachers focused on both conceptual clarity and problem-solving skills. Their feedback pushed me to keep improving. I’m thankful for the support that helped me reach my goal.

Arjun

Student, JEE-MAIN: 98.41%

I came here to strengthen my fundamentals for JEE, and the institute exceeded my expectations. The study material and assignments were comprehensive and well-structured. Teachers paid attention to every student and made sure we progressed steadily. The test series helped build confidence and exam temperament.
